form.formComment: Hasn't been that impressive recently but he does have good record over this track and distance. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hasn't been that impressive recently but he does have good record over this track and distance. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

form.formComment: Returns from a 11 weeks spell and hit the frame when last resuming, finishing third over 520m at Wentworth Park. Expected to go very well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from a 11 weeks spell and hit the frame when last resuming, finishing third over 520m at Wentworth Park. Expected to go very well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked through the 1st turn and shifted out.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 5th on April 16 over 324m at Richmond Straight in a Grade 5. Not doing enough to be considered.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up after finishing 5th on April 16 over 324m at Richmond Straight in a Grade 5. Not doing enough to be considered.

form.formComment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest finishing second (19.16) at Bulli. Tricky draw to overcome. Deserves respect.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest finishing second (19.16) at Bulli. Tricky draw to overcome. Deserves respect.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in shortly after the start and was checked.
At the start stumbled off the mats.

form.formComment: Has finished fifth at the last two runs, both at Taree Super Track, the latest when beaten 5.5 lengths behind Tulloch Road over 300m. Major threat on best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished fifth at the last two runs, both at Taree Super Track, the latest when beaten 5.5 lengths behind Tulloch Road over 300m. Major threat on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels and was carried wider rounding the first turn.
Was bumped heavily on the hindquarters shortly after the start.

form.formComment: Last start finished 2nd in a Grade 5 on April 15 over 320m at Richmond behind Run For Dad beaten one length (18.54). In form and can return to the winners' list.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 2nd in a Grade 5 on April 15 over 320m at Richmond behind Run For Dad beaten one length (18.54). In form and can return to the winners' list.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together in the home straight.

form.formComment: Got off the mark three back with her maiden win at Bulli. Placed following that before a last start sixth at Goulburn. Others rate better this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Got off the mark three back with her maiden win at Bulli. Placed following that before a last start sixth at Goulburn. Others rate better this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels galloped on in the first turn and ran wide, losing ground.
Was tightened for room in the first turn and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Improved sharply when third behind Cold Hard Cash at Richmond last start over 401m (23.48). Has to be respected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved sharply when third behind Cold Hard Cash at Richmond last start over 401m (23.48). Has to be respected.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels galloped on nearing the entrance to the home straight and lost momentum.
